name: Drakogor
senses: darkvision 60 ft., low-light vision, sense the masses;
melee: bite +18 (2d6+12 P; critical burn 1d10) or claw +18 (2d6+12 S; critical bleed 1d6) or tail slap +18 (2d6+12 B; critical knockdown)
ranged: particle laser blast +15 (2d6 F plus low radiation; critical burn 2d6; range 60 ft.)
offensive_abilities: breath weapon (60-ft. cone, 8d6 E&F, Reflex DC 14 half, usable every 1d4 rounds), living battery, roar (DC 14)

special_abilities.name: Living Battery (Ex)
special_abilities.description: Drakogors recharge their breath weapons by consuming energy attacks. When a drakogor takes at least 10 damage from any weapon that targets its EAC, as a standard action on their next turn they redirect the energy into a breath weapon dealing the same type of damage as the attack.

special_abilities.name: Roar (Su)
special_abilities.description: A drakogor’s roar creates unsettling vibrations. A drakogor roars as a standard action. Creatures within 300 feet must succeed at a DC 14 Fortitude save or become sickened for 1d6 rounds. Creatures who are shaken from a drakogor’s frightful presence are panicked for 1 round (no save). Once a creature has been exposed to a drakogor’s roar, it cannot be affected by any drakogor’s roar for 24 hours. This is an emotion, fear, mind-affecting, and sense-dependent effect. Other drakogors are immune.

Special Abilities
Living Battery (Ex)
Drakogors recharge their breath weapons by consuming energy attacks. When a drakogor takes at least 10 damage from any weapon that targets its EAC, as a standard action on their next turn they redirect the energy into a breath weapon dealing the same type of damage as the attack.
Roar (Su)
A drakogor’s roar creates unsettling vibrations. A drakogor roars as a standard action. Creatures within 300 feet must succeed at a DC 14 Fortitude save or become sickened for 1d6 rounds. Creatures who are shaken from a drakogor’s frightful presence are panicked for 1 round (no save). Once a creature has been exposed to a drakogor’s roar, it cannot be affected by any drakogor’s roar for 24 hours. This is an emotion, fear, mind-affecting, and sense-dependent effect. Other drakogors are immune.
